description: Builds and maintains server-side logic, APIs, databases, and infrastructure. Focuses on reliability, scalability, and correctness of systems that power applications.
core_skills: Python or JavaScript (Node.js) or Java or Go
expected_projects: Production-grade REST API with proper auth, validation, error handling, and docs
System with background job processing (email queue, scheduled tasks)
Database-heavy project demonstrating schema design, indexing, and query optimization
API with rate limiting, logging, and structured error responses
Microservices-lite project or service with a message queue integration
